title: Better Block Sounds Fork
description: Updating old blocks with new, better block sounds.
body:
This is not an original mod. You can find the original Better Block Sounds mod by Ordana [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/bbs).

Differences:
- Neoforge/Fabric/Quilt 1.21.1 supports

In next version:
- Config menu. You'll be able to customize what sound a particular block will play.
- ~~Fabric/Quilt support~~  
  
![versions](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/1232054.svg)

![neoforge](https://github.com/thomasglasser/thomasglasser/blob/main/files/badges/cozy/supported/neoforge_64h.png?raw=true) ![quilt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/quilt_64h.png) ![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png)
